title: leonurus ruderalis
intro: Leonurus ruderalis, also known as Wood Betony or Hedge Balm, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as headaches, digestive issues, and skin problems. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Leonurus ruderalis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the skin.
